steps.t: King Thorin III is at Ravenhill. You have come to Ravenhill with King Thorin III and should now seek an audience with Dís.
Dís can be found in the chambers of Ravenhill. You have come to Ravenhill seeking to answer an urgent summons. You should talk to Dís.
Arcah, Daughter of Croär, is at Ravenhill. After speaking with the King under the Mountain, Arcah desires to learn more of you.
King Thorin III is at Ravenhill. You have spoken to Arcah and told her much of your adventures, and you should now speak to King Thorin III.
